title: Analytics - Login
scenario: Verify that login and logout events are logged in Firebase with default elements, and that event counts update after a few hours.
steps: Open Login event in Firebase - page opens properly and contains default elements, Screen name, User Type, and Action.
Trigger login and logout event on mobile - after some time (usually a few hours), event count for related elements increases.
expected: Event counts are updated after a few hours. Default elements present for every event include: Graph for this event, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
